summary: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) Reading answer comparison correctly marks TRUE/FALSE/NOT GIVEN answers as correct, (2) Listening audio TTS returns base64 JSON and frontend decodes to blob URL for playback, (3) Writing skill redirects to /writing-practice not /writing-practice/task1, (4) UI uses light amber/cream/orange warm colors instead of dark slate. Backend filters out questions with empty correct field. 10/10 pytest tests passed, all Playwright UI tests passed.

bug_fixes_verified.description: Reading answer comparison - correct answer marked as correct
bug_fixes_verified.test_method: Playwright UI test - selected TRUE for question 'Fast chargers can add 200 miles of range in 20 minutes', got green Correct! feedback
Backend test confirms /api/vocab-grammar/tts returns JSON with base64 audio field. Playwright confirms frontend decodes to blob:// URL and audio plays with 'Playing...' indicator
bug_fixes_verified.code_location: PracticeMode.js - generateAudio() decodes base64 via atob() to Uint8Array to Blob

bug_fixes_verified.test_method: Playwright navigated to /question-bank/practice?skill=writing, confirmed redirect to /writing-practice (not /writing-practice/task1)

bug_fixes_verified.description: Light/warm UI colors instead of dark
bug_fixes_verified.test_method: Playwright verified page classes contain 'from-amber-50 via-orange-50 to-yellow-50' and NO slate-900/slate-800

bug_fixes_verified.description: GET /api/question-bank/practice/random filters out questions with empty correct field
bug_fixes_verified.test_method: pytest verified 0 questions with empty correct field across 30 reading and 30 listening questions
bug_fixes_verified.code_location: question_bank.py line ~584: questions = [q for q in questions if q.get('correct')]

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing Cambridge + AI question pools
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 Quick Practice mode bugs are fixed. extractOptionValue() extracts A/B/C/D from options like 'A. option text'. normalizeAnswer() does case-insensitive comparison. TTS returns JSON {audio: base64}, frontend decodes with atob(). Writing redirects to /writing-practice. UI uses warm amber/orange/yellow gradients. Backend filters empty correct answers at line 584 in question_bank.py.
